description: Contract for repo health: run these checks to keep the tree clean and reduce drift before commit/push.

docs_consistency.description: Doc and config references exist; eval_matrix valid

task_preflight_static.description: Task definitions valid (instruction length, test.sh, no placeholders)

prompt_hygiene.description: Modified prompt files must not leak code locations, solution strategies, or verifier details

selection_file.description: configs/selected_benchmark_tasks.json exists and is valid JSON

launch_policy.description: configs/*.sh launchers must source configs/_common.sh when using shared run helpers, and must not use raw harbor run

recommendations: Merge working state often; keep branches short
After changing docs or configs, run docs_consistency to catch drift
